title: Wood Carvings
description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

options.title: Snake
options.requires: None of your cards can be Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Toric Toughness[/gold].

conditions: At least 1 basic removable card in deck
notes: This event presents three options for transforming a starter card or enchanting an existing card. The [purple]Snake[/purple] option becomes locked if none of your cards are able to be enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple]. After choosing an option, the event shows a brief story page describing the mystical result of placing the chosen carving on the pedestal.
